hero_subtitle: SFTY helps exchanges consolidate provider outputs into structured compliance cases and audit-ready evidence to streamline regulatory inspection readiness and reduce operational risk.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness falters across disconnected systems
problem_description: Exchanges face challenges preparing for regulatory inspections due to fragmented compliance case management and scattered audit evidence. This limits clear operational control and slows accurate review of AML workflows during regulatory scrutiny.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates scattered compliance data, provider outputs, case workflows and decision logs into one unified audit evidence layer enabling exchanges to respond efficiently and transparently to regulatory inspections.
workflow_title: From provider alerts to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes exchange alerts through risk rules into structured cases where decisions, evidence and reports are recorded for regulatory inspection readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives exchanges a provider-neutral layer that links alerts, cases, decisions and evidence into one auditable compliance workflow for regulatory inspection readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports exchanges by unifying provider outputs and audit evidence with bank due diligence and enterprise deployment controls for reliable regulatory inspection workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support exchange preparation for regulatory inspections
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows preserve audit-ready compliance evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how provider outputs connect to exchange case management
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports sanctions screening and escalation
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for crypto exchanges?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides crypto exchanges with a connected compliance layer that connects KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, sanctions screening, case management and reporting workflows into one operational system.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support regulatory inspections?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports inspections by preserving decision logs, evidence packages and case histories, enabling exchanges to demonstrate consistent compliance through structured workflows and audit trails.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY captures and preserves case records, decision logs and supporting evidence in a format designed for regulatory review and audit readiness without altering original provider data.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is provider-neutral and integrates outputs from existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening systems into one controlled, auditable workflow layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace existing providers but connects their outputs into structured cases, decisions and reports to streamline compliance operations.
final_title: Prepare exchange compliance for regulatory inspection
final_description: Review how SFTY structures case workflows, audit evidence and provider outputs to support exchange inspection readiness.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
